message:
feat(search): add daemon bridge adapter for frankensearch batch coalescing (B7 milestone)

Bridge between the embedding daemon's protocol and frankensearch's
BatchCoalescer + CachedEmbedder APIs. Adds EmbedPriority mapping,
DaemonBridgeConfig/Metrics aggregation, batch request/response types,
explainability diagnostics, and DaemonDispatch to the orchestrator.

- daemon_bridge.rs: 46 tests covering priority mapping, config bridging,
  metrics aggregation, batch types, and explainability
- orchestrator.rs: DaemonDispatch enum (Disabled/Legacy/Managed) with
  15 new B7 tests (84 total)
- proptest_search_orchestrator.rs: arb_daemon_dispatch() strategy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
